title: Salty Juicy Turkish Masarepa Kebabs
description: A twist on traditional Turkish kebabs, these masarepa kebabs are perfect for a brunch or breakfast meal. With their crispy exterior and juicy interior, they are a delight to eat.
instructions: Heat 1/2 tablespoon of olive oil in a pan over medium heat
Add chopped onion and minced garlic, cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes
Add chili flakes, if using, and cook for an additional minute
Add grated tomato and cook for about 2 minutes, stirring occasionally
Add salt to taste and stir to combine
Meanwhile, mix white masarepa with chopped cilantro in a bowl
Add the cooked onion mixture to the bowl and mix until well combined
Form the mixture into 4-6 kebab shapes
Preheat a non-stick skillet or grill over medium heat
Brush the kebabs with olive oil and cook for about 4-5 minutes per side, or until golden brown
Serve with homemade or store-bought beef kofta meatballs
